calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Feb-08-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Bobadillo in Propria Persona.

Ms. Bobadillo stated that the Father is deceased, that he passed away three years ago, that the child was born at home, and that she had no mid-wife and therefore could not obtain a birth certificate from the hospital. Ms. Bobadilla also stated that she wants the father's name on the birth certificate. The Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Birth (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Choi. Not reported.
